# Vendored libraries

## gif.js

`gif.js` and `gif.worker.js` are the GIF encoder by Johan Nordberg, version 0.2.0.

- Source: https://github.com/jnordberg/gif.js
- License: MIT (Copyright (c) 2013 Johan Nordberg)

Used by `docs/record.js` to encode a recorded poke into an animated GIF in the
browser. Vendored locally so the site keeps working with no CDN and no build
step. Not modified.
